description_long: This bungalow features a hip roof with a central peak and a light-colored exterior, surrounded by a well-maintained yard enclosed by a low fence. The front facade includes a covered porch with steps leading up to the main entrance, flanked by landscaped greenery and a paved walkway. The backyard is equipped with a swimming pool, patio furniture, and a small garden area, providing ample outdoor living space. Windows are arranged in a mostly symmetrical pattern on the front and rear, with additional side windows for natural light. The property includes paved areas for seating and relaxation, as well as grassy lawns and decorative plants. The overall design is modern suburban, with clean lines and a focus on comfort and outdoor amenities.
description: A modern hip-roof bungalow with a covered front porch, landscaped yard, and a backyard pool, featuring symmetrical windows and outdoor living spaces.
description_view_0: Front view showing the covered porch, main entrance, landscaped walkway, and symmetrical windows.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the hip roof, side windows, patio area, and partial view of the backyard pool.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the backyard pool, patio furniture, garden area, and rear windows.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the hip roof, side patio with seating, and a clear view of the fenced yard.
attribute_window_arrangement: symmetrical front-facing windows with additional side and rear windows
